A car evaluation system refers to a framework, algorithm, or software program used to assess a vehicle based on specific parameters. Depending on the context, this system can serve distinct purposes: calculating financial resale values, conducting deep mechanical diagnostics, analyzing consumer acceptability datasets for machine learning.
An end-to-end machine learning pipeline and XAI framework for predicting 30-day clinical readmission risk.

To design and implement a robust machine learning framework to forecast one-month-ahead stock volatility using historical price data, enhancing risk assessment capabilities and enabling data-driven portfolio diversification.

Security Vulnerability Detection Framework designed to identify and mitigate key operating system vulnerabilities such as buffer overflows, cache poisoning, and abnormal system behavior. The framework combines rule-based monitoring with machine learningbased anomaly detection to provide real-time alerts and improved system security
LucidEpoch: A machine learning framework and Streamlit dashboard for predicting and explaining sleep disorder risks using wearable data.

A research-driven AML framework that investigates the effectiveness of graph neural networks, classical machine learning, and heterophily-aware architectures for detecting illicit activity in cryptocurrency transaction networks.

This project develops an end-to-end machine learning framework for predicting heart attack risk using healthcare survey data. The solution goes beyond traditional classification by implementing a stacked ensemble architecture that combines multiple machine learning algorithms to improve predictive performance, robustness, and generalization.
An AI-driven SDN microsegmentation framework that integrates Machine Learning with ONOS to detect malicious traffic and dynamically enforce Zero Trust policies using OpenFlow.

Large-scale ICU data warehouse and machine learning framework for early sepsis warning, leveraging SQL temporal analytics, Python ETL pipelines, relational database design, and physiological feature engineering across 40,000+ patient records
Machine learning frameworks and data pipelines for modeling microstructural evolution, radiation damage, and mechanical degradation in nuclear materials.

Machine learning speeds up the search for High-Entropy Alloys (HEAs), but its ability to make accurate predictions is limited by the lack of reliable experimental data. To solve this problem, a generative data augmentation framework for predicting HEA phases is used.

A machine learning framework for predicting software project failure using historical project data and decision-oriented risk analysis.

This project is part of the submission of Bharat Antriksh Hackathon 2026. It combines a use of modern web development frameworks, AI & Machine Learning knowledge.

Official implementation of IFOSS (Isolation Forest + One-Sided Selection), a systematic preprocessing framework for robust machine learning on noisy clinical COVID-19 data. The repository includes preprocessing, benchmarking, visualization, ablation, and simulation studies for reproducible clinical machine learning research.

A unified scientific machine learning framework built on JAX/Flax NNX

This project develops an enhanced phishing detection framework using a novel hybrid CNN + XGBoost architecture. It employs a Hybrid Ensemble Feature Selection (HEFS) methodology and compares tuned models such as Random Forest, XGBoost, CNN, and TCN via meta-learning layers to provide a robust solution for identifying malicious URLs.

Open-source framework for transient 2D diffusion modeling in skin-like domains using the Generalized Finite Differences Method, featuring mesh libraries, visualization outputs, and large-scale dataset generation for machine learning and parameter studies.

Machine learning framework for vaccine target discovery in ESKAPE pathogens  extracts sequence-based features and classifies candidate proteins with confidence scoring. Installable via pip, includes a local web interface for running analyses.

Implementation of the HTPSO-AKNN machine learning framework for smart grid stability and reliability prediction using data preprocessing, FFT-based feature extraction, hyperparameter optimization, classification, and performance evaluation.

A machine learning framework to simulate and predict the 2026 FIFA World Cup tournament from the group stage to the final.

Phishing websites steal sensitive user information by mimicking legitimate websites. This paper proposes a hyperparameter-optimized machine learning framework that improves phishing detection accuracy while reducing false positives using URL and website features.

This machine learning project implements a Linear Regression model to analyze AI industry trends. By evaluating historical data across fifty records with structural accuracy, it maps the direct correlation between professional experience and salary packages. The system establishes a perfect zero-error predictive framework for market forecasting.

# Ransomware Detection Framework  A Machine Learning framework for early ransomware detection based on  behavioral analysis, designed for small business environments.

This project will include:  IoT traffic monitoring with Zeek IDS and Wireshark. Communication security with MQTT (Mosquitto) and TLS encryption.  Response automation with Node-RED. Anomaly detection with a machine learning (AI/ML) model.  Deployment with Docker and GitHub/GitLab.
Pure C machine learning framework. Currently processes structured numerical datasets.
SENTINEL SPHERE is an AI-driven cloud security framework for real-time DoS attack detection, monitoring, and automated mitigation using Machine Learning, NGINX, Prometheus, Grafana, and Mistral LLM.

An open-source framework for auditing the trustworthiness of clinical machine learning models through integrated evaluation of calibration, explainability, robustness, clinical utility, and cross-cohort validation.

End-to-end diabetes prediction system using Machine Learning and the CRISP-DM framework. Features data preprocessing, EDA, advanced missing value imputation, model evaluation, and an interactive Streamlit web application.

A hybrid machine learning and LLM agent framework for weather-driven solar output prediction. Combines geospatial satellite data and Bureau of Meteorology weather records to generate daily solar yield estimates with calibrated confidence scores, accessible through a natural-language Q&A interface built on Claude Haiku 4.5 and FastAPI.

This project investigates short-term arrival delay time prediction in freight rail operations using historical operational datasets and machine learning models. The framework captures delay propagation patterns to enhance prediction accuracy, improve operational efficiency, and assist decision-making in freight rail network management.

It combines advanced AI, machine learning, microservices architecture, and comprehensive security frameworks to deliver professional-grade cybersecurity assessments.

sm2rain_hydroai is an AI-enhanced SM2RAIN framework for estimating rainfall from satellite soil moisture. It combines physical inversion with machine learning and deep learning to improve rainfall reconstruction, extreme event monitoring, and hydrologic analysis across climates and regions.

A growing machine learning framework built entirely from scratch in pure Python  no external libraries such as NumPy or scikit-learn.  The goal is to deeply understand how machine learning algorithms work internally by implementing them from first principles.

This ontology provides researchers, developers, and practitioners with a unified, machine-readable framework to guide the design and assessment of fair ML systems.
